# coolify_cloud_token (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a single Coolify cloud token by its UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_cloud_token" "example" {
  uuid = "existing-cloud-token-uuid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud token to look up.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider type.
- `name` (String) The name of the cloud token.
